name: Categorizer
description: Categorizes uncategorized transactions using Haiku, with user examples as few-shot guidance

parameters.query: SELECT id, name, parent_id FROM categories ORDER BY COALESCE(parent_id, id), name;

SELECT e.description_pattern, c.name AS category_name, e.times_reinforced FROM category_examples e JOIN categories c ON e.category_id = c.id ORDER BY e.times_reinforced DESC, e.updated_at DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT id, description, memo, amount FROM transactions WHERE category_id IS NULL AND user_category_override = false ORDER BY posted_date DESC LIMIT 500;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 4096, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE transactions SET category_id = {{ $json.category_id }} WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}' AND user_category_override = false AND category_id IS NULL;

parameters.jsCode:
// When no uncategorized transactions, short-circuit gracefully
return [{ json: $input.first().json }];
